ITEM: Design Criteria (PAGE 3)
- Concrete Strength: Insitu Concrete 50 MPa, Precast Concrete 60 MPa
- Reinforcing Steel: N bars fsy 500 MPa, R bars fsy 250 MPa
- Structural Steel: fsy 350 MPa
- Tubular Steel: fsy 350 MPa
- Mooring Loads: Lateral Wind Area 3728m², Longitudinal Wind Area 596m²
- Berthing Loads: Dead Weight Tonnage 10608 tonnes, Displacement Tonnage 17341 tonnes, Length Overall 169m, Beam Breadth 24.7m
- Berthing Velocity: 0.1m/s, Current Velocity: 0.2m/s
- Wind Loads: Ultimate Limit State 45 m/s, Serviceability Limit State 22 m/s
- Seismic Forces: AS1170.4 -2007, Importance Level 2, Annual Exceedance Probability 1:500
- Corrosion Allowances: New Piles 3.0mm, New Steel Work 1.0mm
- Design Life: 50 years
